title: Highflame RED
description: Highflame RED provides autonomous adversarial testing of AI Agents using research backed attack engines that generate novel & real-life adversarial testing scenarios. The RED teaming toolkit includes automatic reconnaissance of target Agent capabilities, Tool and Access privileges to autonomously generate test cases and test. RED also includes our sandboxed inference testing mode (for testing tool & model access in runtime) as well as an LLM Model & MCP Supply Chain Scan that incorporates for complete end-to-end testing.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025
OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for Agentic Apps 2026

items: Map red scenarios to blue controls
